decisions.title: Baseline G5/G6 before execution
decisions.description: G5 parser suites (binance/bybit/coinbase/hyperliquid) already green in focused go test. G6 failed by one token CHANGE_ME at deploy/configs/server.jsonc:27; minimal fix is replacing this placeholder key without changing runtime behavior.
alternatives: Run full workspace gates before fixing G6 (rejected because known blocker already identified).

decisions.title: Minimal layering-safe fix for G6
decisions.description: Only deploy config token replacement is required; no parser/runtime code change needed because G5 tests are already green. This preserves layering/invariants and avoids introducing features.
alternatives: Touch parser code proactively (rejected due unnecessary risk/regression).

decisions.title: G6 fixed with single-key placeholder replacement
decisions.description: Replaced only the api key placeholder token name in deploy/configs/server.jsonc from CHANGE_ME_prod_key_1 to prod_key_1. No parser/runtime logic changes were needed for G5.
alternatives: Inject environment-variable templating into config (rejected as broader change not required by gate).

decisions.title: Gate validation order preserved and all green
decisions.description: Validated in required sequence: make invariants-check, make test-workspace, make lint, make go-tidy-check; additionally ran make docs-check after PRD update. All commands passed.
alternatives: Skip full gate sequence after focused parser tests (rejected to avoid false-positive closure).
